name: Caliber Imaging & Diagnostics, Inc.
description: Caliber Imaging & Diagnostics, Inc. is a medical technology company that designs, develops, and markets innovative in vivo and ex vivo confocal microscopy imaging systems. The company's flagship VivaScope systems enable noninvasive, real-time imaging of skin and other tissues at cellular resolution, providing clinicians and researchers with immediate diagnostic insights without the need for physical biopsies. Caliber ID serves dermatologists, researchers, and surgeons worldwide, facilitating advanced tissue analysis and improving patient care.
